main_findings.best_overall_model: MLP achieved the highest accuracy and macro F1-score.
main_findings.strong_reference_models: Logistic Regression and Random Forest performed very close to MLP.
main_findings.weakest_model: Decision Tree had the lowest overall performance.
main_findings.easiest_class: BOMBAY was classified perfectly by all models.
main_findings.hardest_confusion_pair: DERMASON and SIRA were the most frequently confused classes.
main_findings.secondary_confusion_pair: BARBUNYA and CALI also showed repeated confusion.
